did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a survey that reviews existing literature on skin lesion classification using machine learning and deep learning. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI methods; rather, it summarizes and analyzes previously published studies, datasets (e.g., ISIC, PH2, HAM10000), and performance metrics from other works.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
